name: C# Runner MCP — C# Code Execution
what_it_does: C# Runner MCP server enabling AI agents to execute C# code snippets — running C# scripts via dotnet-script or similar runtime, capturing console output and return values, and integrating C# code execution into agent-driven .NET development, testing, and automation workflows.
use_cases: Testing C# code snippets from .NET development agents
Executing C# algorithms for data processing from analysis agents
Validating .NET API usage from coding assistant agents
Running C# scripts for automation from DevOps agents
Prototyping .NET solutions quickly from rapid development agents
Debugging C# logic in isolation from troubleshooting agents
not_for: Full .NET application execution (this is script/snippet focused)
Non-.NET developers (use Python or JavaScript execution MCPs)
best_when: A .NET developer needs AI agents to test and execute C# code snippets for rapid prototyping, algorithm testing, or .NET API validation.
avoid_when: You don't do .NET development, or need full application execution — use appropriate language-specific execution MCPs.

auth.notes: No authentication — local code execution using installed .NET runtime.

pricing.notes: Free, open source. .NET SDK is free. Community MCP from mcp-ecosystem org.

known_agent_gotchas: .NET SDK must be installed — version 6.0+ recommended
dotnet-script or CSX compilation adds 1-5 seconds compile overhead per execution
NuGet package references in scripts may fail or require offline cache
Execution runs with user permissions — code can access local filesystem
Community MCP from mcp-ecosystem — good quality but niche .NET use case
Error messages from C# compiler can be verbose — agent must parse them correctly
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local C# code execution with user permissions. No credentials needed. Executing AI-generated C# code has arbitrary execution risk — review code. Community MCP. .NET runtime access to system APIs.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local code execution. User permissions. Review AI-generated code before execution. Community MCP.
